title: Smoky Aerated Australian Sesame Flatbread
description: A light, airy flatbread infused with smoky flavors and nut-free friendly, perfect for a quick snack or lunch.
instructions: Combine warm water and yeast in a large mixing bowl, let it sit for 5 minutes.
Add flour, salt, and sesame butter to the bowl, mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces, roll each piece into a ball and then flatten it slightly into a disk shape.
Place the flatbreads on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, brush with olive oil and garlic-infused oil.
Bake the flatbreads in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Brush the flatbreads with smoked paprika and black sesame seeds immediately after baking.
Let the flatbreads cool for 5 minutes before serving.
